headings.usage: All headings (h1-h6), stats, and heavy labels

body.usage: Paragraphs, inputs, table data, UI elements

sidebar.style: fixed left-0 top-0 h-full bg-slate-900 text-white

visual_enhancers.shadows: Soft, diffuse shadows for dropdowns and modals
visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: Used sparingly on sticky headers (backdrop-blur-md bg-white/80)

instructions_to_main_agent: Implement the 'Industrial Pro' theme using Tailwind CSS variables.
Use 'Barlow Condensed' for all headings to give a strong construction feel.
Ensure the sidebar is dark (#1E293B) with white text and orange active states.
Use the provided Unsplash URLs for the login page and empty states.
Strictly follow the 'Bento Grid Mode B' for the dashboard layout.
Ensure all forms (Quotes/Invoices) are dense and data-heavy but legible.
Do not use gradients for backgrounds; stick to solid colors and subtle textures.
Ensure all interactive elements have 'data-testid' attributes.
universal_guidelines: Avoid 'AI slop' aesthetic; make it distinct and professional.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur) for overlays.
Do not apply universal transitions (transition: all).
Do not center align the app container.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui.
